CheckTitle: Users cannot access the Office Store or start trials
Description: The org-wide apps and services settings should disable **Let users access the Office Store** (**isOfficeStoreEnabled**) and **Let users start trials on behalf of your organization** (**isAppAndServicesTrialEnabled**). This prevents users from installing arbitrary store add-ins or provisioning trial services without administrative oversight.
Risk: Allowing users to install **Office Store** add-ins or start service trials introduces unvetted third-party code and services into the tenant, which can access user data (mail, files) and expand the attack surface without administrator review.

Code.Other:
1. Navigate to the Microsoft 365 admin center at https://admin.microsoft.com/
2. Go to **Settings** > **Org settings** > **Services** > **User owned apps and services**
3. Uncheck **Let users access the Office Store**
4. Uncheck **Let users start trials on behalf of your organization**
5. Click **Save**

Recommendation.Text: Disable Office Store access and organization trials so that only administrators can introduce add-ins and services into the tenant.
